title: Forms: Only allow Customers to Upload specific File Type
excerpt:

posts.author: ktaylor (Kathleen Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
We utilize our Forms for the purpose of having our customers upload their files for implementation.

It would be really helpful if there was a feature on the monday Forms that would allow us to limit the type of files that can be uploaded via these Forms?

For example, for customer imports, we only want to have the Form to allow customers to upload only Excel files - not pdf or word documents.

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ktaylor

Nachliel from Easyapps here

Our monday app Easyform enables you to do just that. You can limit the type, number, and size of files the user can upload with the form to any type you choose.
For example, here I am limiting the file type to Exel and trying to upload an image:

Regardless, if you are interested in creating styled forms that better match your brand and embed perfectly in your web page, you can check out our monday.com app Easyform and our extensive documentation site.

You can set up a free demo here or contact us at support@easyappshq.com.

I hope this helps.

Nachliel
